issues.description: First effect describes a passive Blocker keyword grant, not an activated ability. Should use trigger:'Trigger' (passive grant on play) or have no trigger, not 'Activated'. The DON cost is part of the card's static ability text, not an activated action.
Blocker is a permanent keyword grant (the Character 'gains' it), not a temporary effect. Duration should be 'Permanent', not 'EndOfTurn'.
Action type is 'PlayFromHand' but card specifies playing from trash ('from your trash'). Should be 'PlayFromTrash' or equivalent that targets the trash zone.
Filter uses 'subType' for 'CP', but CP is typically a type, not subtype. Should be 'type':'CP' or 'hasType':'CP'.
